name: sast
summary: sast — free, fast static application security testing for CI/CD. Installs a self-contained SAST engine on first run: native AST + cross-file taint across 16 languages (no external tools), secrets with live key validation, SCA, vulnerable JS libraries, CMS plugin/theme/core CVEs (WordPress/Joomla/Drupal/Magento), web-shell & malware detection, IaC; HTML/JSON/SARIF.
author: CQR Cybersecurity LLC
